acceptance_criteria: Quote-to-order conversion and sheet-native conversion ownership proof.

assertions.label: Quote-to-order route parsing exists but conversion mutation is not yet sheet-native-owned
assertions.expected: Quote-to-order initiation uses a sheet-native conversion mutation that explicitly owns the lifecycle.
assertions.observed: OrderCreatorPage.tsx:379-385 parses quoteIdFromRoute and isDuplicateRoute. Route hydration at lines 639-682 loads quote data and maps it for duplication. However, the conversion mutation (quoteId → draft) relies on the existing SalesWorkspacePage redirect flow and is classified as not-started in ordersRolloutContract.ts (ORD-WF-008).

assertions.label: Sheet-native conversion ownership is not yet explicitly established
assertions.expected: An explicit sheet-native conversion path exists inside the Orders rollout contract with proof of ownership.
assertions.observed: ordersRolloutContract.ts:128-131 shows ORD-WF-008 (quote-to-order + conversion) as implementationStatus: not-started, surfacingStatus: not-started, releaseStatus: open. No sheet-native conversion mutation exists yet.

unblock_condition: Explicit sheet-native conversion ownership decision: either (a) implement a sheet-native conversion mutation and prove it, or (b) reclassify conversion as adjacent-owned with evidence.

SALE-ORD-012.evidence: Quote duplication route exists (isDuplicateRoute parsing + hydration). Quote-to-order conversion mutation is not yet sheet-native-owned.

SALE-ORD-028.evidence: ORD-WF-008 is implementationStatus: not-started. No explicit sheet-native conversion path exists.
SALE-ORD-028.residual: Explicit ownership decision required before this row can progress.
